[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011011011 6
1 1000001101 4
2 0111100000 4
3 1011000000 3
4 1001010101 5
5 0000100100 2
6 1011101110 7
7 1111101010 7

57 1011000000 3 match 3
